name: Gourmet Sirloin Tips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add the sirloin tips to the skillet and brown on all sides, about 4-5 minutes per side.
4. Remove the sirloin tips from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, mix together the remaining ingredients (catsup, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, salt, and pepper).
6. Return the sirloin tips to the skillet and add enough water or broth to cover them.
7. Cover and simmer over low heat until the meat is tender, about 20-25 minutes.
8. Serve the sirloin tips over rice. Enjoy.
